description: Trust layer for AI agents. 250+ verified data capabilities (IBAN validation, sanctions screening, company registry lookups, KYB, adverse media) with real-time quality scores and audit trails. TypeScript and Python SDKs, MCP server, plus integrations for LangChain, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel, and more.
rules: Strale uses a prepaid wallet model — users top up via Stripe, then spend credits on API calls. No per-transaction Stripe fees.
5 capabilities are free-tier (no API key needed): email-validate, dns-lookup, json-repair, url-to-markdown, iban-validate. IP rate limited to 10/day.
The primary API endpoint is POST /v1/do — it accepts natural language (task field) or direct slug (capabilitySlug field).
Solutions are bundled multi-step workflows (e.g. kyb-essentials-se, kyb-complete-se, invoice-verify-se) covering 20 countries.
MCP server connects via Streamable HTTP at https://api.strale.io/mcp — no local install needed.
Every capability has a Strale Quality Score (SQS) from 0-100 based on continuous testing. Check via GET /v1/quality/:slug.
The npm package is 'straleio' (not 'strale'). The MCP server package is 'strale-mcp'.
Python package is also 'straleio' on PyPI. Import: from straleio import Strale.
API keys start with 'sk_live_'. Base URL is https://api.strale.io.
